relation_definitions.affects: Subject influences status, risk, cost or performance of the object (merged impacts, directs, related_to).
relation_definitions.classifies: Subject classifies or types the object (merged is_a, of_type, has_category, category_of).
relation_definitions.consists_of: Subject is composed of object elements (merged: contains, set_of, has, has_a, category_of, has_category, belongs_to, part_of, is_part_of, is_a_critical_part_of, groups, structured_by, structured_in, can_have_a).
relation_definitions.consumes: Subject uses resources/services provided by the object (distinct from general uses/requires).
relation_definitions.defines: Subject documents or specifies the structure/semantics of the object (merged is_described_in).
relation_definitions.ensures: Subject assures required quality/compliance of the object (merged guarantees).
relation_definitions.governed_by: Subject is governed or constrained by the object.
relation_definitions.improves: Subject enhances quality or capability of the object.
relation_definitions.informs: Subject provides information influencing decisions about the object.
relation_definitions.is_similar_to: Subject has notable similarity to the object.
relation_definitions.owned_by: Subject is owned by (or formally belongs to) the object organization or group.
relation_definitions.protects: Subject safeguards or secures the object (security-focused control).
relation_definitions.provides: Subject supplies or delivers the object service/capability (merged delivers, delivered_by, provided_by, offers, maintains).
relation_definitions.realizes: Subject implements or realizes the abstract concept represented by the object (merged implements, implemented_by, realized_by, realized_through).
relation_definitions.regulates: Subject enforces rules or constraints on the object (merged constrains, controls).
relation_definitions.relToChild: Hierarchical child relation between Fact Sheets (must stay within same Fact Sheet type).
relation_definitions.relToParent: Hierarchical parent relation between Fact Sheets (must stay within same Fact Sheet type).
relation_definitions.relToPredecessor: Versioning/lineage predecessor within the same Fact Sheet type.
relation_definitions.relToRequiredBy: Reverse dependency: the subject is required by the object (any Fact Sheet type allowed).
relation_definitions.relToRequires: Dependency: the subject requires the object (any Fact Sheet type allowed).
relation_definitions.relToSuccessor: Versioning/lineage successor within the same Fact Sheet type.
relation_definitions.relToTechPlatform: Outgoing relation to another Tech Platform.
relation_definitions.requires: Subject depends on the object; inverse dependency variants merged (required_by, must_have, runs_on).
relation_definitions.responsible_for: Subject has operational or governance responsibility for the object.
relation_definitions.status_of: Subject represents a lifecycle/status facet of the object.
relation_definitions.supported_by: Subject is enabled or sustained by the object (kept as explicit inverse of supports).
relation_definitions.supports: Subject functionally or structurally enables the object (includes hosts, integrates, enables, sponsors).
relation_definitions.transmits: Subject transfers data/information to the object (merged imported_via for simplification).
relation_definitions.uses: Subject uses the object in execution (kept separate from requires for lighter interaction).
relation_definitions.versioned_as: Subject is linked in a version/evolution chain with the object (merged successor, predecessor, follows, can_have_a in version context).
